response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced individual contributor with a strong background in software craftsmanship, testing, and diverse tech stacks. However, this role requires an executive CTO with a track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people and deep domain expertise in production-grade Agentic AI and fintech infrastructure. His background lacks the necessary executive leadership, team scaling experience, and specialized AI-native fintech architecture required for this position.
strengths: Solid experience with high-throughput distributed systems and microservices, including handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Strong engineering fundamentals with a focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD pipelines.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and has not demonstrated scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Insufficient production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes financial environments.
Missing deep domain expertise in algorithmic working capital, real-time credit risk, and trade decisioning.
